framework.name: Cross-Agent Privilege Escalation via Config Rewrite
framework.description: Rehberger showed a prompt-injected Copilot rewriting Claude's .mcp.json, so on next use Claude runs arbitrary code and can reconfigure Copilot back — creating a self-reinforcing compromise loop across agent boundaries.
framework.raw_quote: What starts as a single indirect prompt injection can quickly escalate into a multi-agent compromise.

source.title: Control the Chain, Secure the System: Fixing AI Agent Delegation
